hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.env"|\.env$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files — they contain API keys' >&2; exit 1; fi
echo 'WARNING: This is a destructive operation that cannot be undone in DaVinci Resolve. Confirm with the user before proceeding.' >&2
echo 'CAUTION: Executing arbitrary code in DaVinci Resolve. Review the code carefully before proceeding.' >&2

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"file_path":\s*"[^"]+\.py"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\.py\)"/\1/'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff format --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
